creator: andreas@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Could you please update the port to the actual release ?! 


FTP Directory: ftp://ftp.ncsa.uiuc.edu/HDF/HDF_Current/tar/  

Parent Directory 
HDF4.1r1.tar.gz. . . . . . . . .  [Feb 21 11:46]   3133k 

I'll commit it then. 

Could you please modify the port slightly ? Please take into 
consideration, that FreeBSD-current and FreeBSD-2.2-STABLE  both 
come with libz as part of the base system. 

So I think there is no need for an option to use jpeg. Correct 
my if I'm wrong ;-)
